friction.Wiki: Friction coefficient of the rigid body surface.

restitution.Wiki: Elastic modulus of the rigid body.

maxLinearSpeed.Wiki: Maxmum linear speed allowed for rigid bodies, in m/s.

maxAngularSpeed.Wiki: Maximul angular speed allowed for rigid bodies, in degrees/frame.

linearDampening.Wiki: Linear dampening applied to rigid bodies.

angularDampening.Wiki: Angular rotation dampening applied to rigid bodies. Units are inverse seconds.

gravityFactor.Wiki: The gravity factor to apply to the rigid body.

softContactForceFactor.Wiki: The soft contact factor to apply to the rigid body.

softContactDampFactor.Wiki: The soft contact dampening factor to apply to the rigid body.

Self.Wiki: Determines parameters related to the rigid body.
